rows_second_sweep_higher.notes: Codegen finished cleanly in ~4 min (dsmodel.c 98 MB; dymosim 1.3 GB). Killed after >10 min of dymosim CPU with no .mat written. Wall is the initialization solver at simulate-time, not codegen — algebraic loop with IAPWS-IF97 medium inverse calls per Newton step.

local_exponents.comment: Sub-linear in 100-1000 (overhead dominates); super-linear ~N^1.76 in 1000-2500 — algebraic-loop solve cost begins to dominate.

comparison_julia_MTK_F4_F9.anchor: MTK mtkcompile alone: ~71 s @ 100 pins (≈2k unknowns), exponent ~N^1.6
comparison_julia_MTK_F4_F9.modelica_observation: Compiled 60k unknowns (N=1000) end-to-end in 41 s. Codegen for 300k unknowns finished in ~4 min — well past the regime where MTK's per-component codegen wall lives. The wall MOVES to a different phase: Dymola's initialization solver under IAPWS-IF97 medium calls inside the algebraic loop.
